assertions.text: Le template utilise DejaVu Sans comme font principale
assertions.evidence: Line 9: font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif; — uses Arial, NOT DejaVu Sans. DejaVu is needed for French accents (é, è, à, ç) in DomPDF.

assertions.text: Aucun display:flex ou display:grid dans le template
assertions.evidence: No 'display: flex' found. However the without_skill version uses CSS classes like 'display: inline-block' which is fine.

assertions.text: Utilise des <table> pour le layout (pas de div-based layout)
assertions.evidence: Header uses a <div class="header-section"> (line 172) instead of a table. The layout is div-based for header, not table-based as recommended for DomPDF.

assertions.text: N'utilise pas asset() pour les images (utilise public_path ou base64)
assertions.evidence: Uses $settings['logo_base64'] (line 175) — base64 approach. No asset() calls found.

assertions.text: Utilise la couleur primaire KLASSCI (#0453cb) ou la variable settings
assertions.evidence: Line 29: background: #0453cb hardcoded in header-section. Line 221: color:#0453cb in td style. Uses KLASSCI primary.

assertions.text: Les backgrounds des headers de tableau sont appliqués sur td ou via classe td, pas directement sur tr
assertions.evidence: Lines 80-92: '.payments-table thead th { background: #0453cb; }' — targets <th> which is acceptable. Lines 105-110: ':nth-child(odd/even) td' selectors correctly target td. Note: uses :nth-child which is NOT supported in DomPDF — this is a bug.

assertions.text: Les badges de statut sont colorés (validé=vert, en_attente=orange/jaune, rejeté=rouge)
assertions.evidence: Lines 126-129: status-valid=#16a34a (vert), status-pending=#f59e0b (orange), status-rejected=#dc2626 (rouge). Three distinct colors.

assertions.text: Le template a un bloc header avec logo et titre du document
assertions.evidence: Lines 172-185: header-section div with logo, school-name, and 'Liste des Paiements' document-title. Div-based not table-based.

notes: Two failures: (1) Uses Arial instead of DejaVu Sans — French accents will not render properly. (2) Header uses div layout instead of table. BONUS BUG: Uses :nth-child(even/odd) CSS which DomPDF does NOT support — the alternating rows will not work.
